channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rescued Raven in Prince George Mimics Caretaker's Sneeze and Other Sounds
item.description: Huxley, a three-year-old rescued raven at Good Caws Crow Rescue in Prince George, British Columbia, has gained attention for mimicking the dramatic sneezes of the shelter's founder, Dayna Slater. Huxl...

item.title: Pelican Park family appeals for information on missing grandmother with Alzheimer's
item.description: A family in Pelican Park is desperately searching for their 73-year-old grandmother, Maureen Peskin, who has been missing for two weeks. She disappeared while walking home from a visit to her cousin's...

item.title: Iran rejects US ceasefire offer, outlines regional demands through Pakistan
item.description: Iran has officially conveyed to Pakistan its refusal of the US ceasefire proposal, stressing that a permanent end to the war is necessary. The Iranian response, reported by the IRNA news agency, inclu...

item.title: Market Movers: Strategy Changes, Coinbase Performance, and Paramount Updates
item.description: The Wall Street Journal’s April 6, 2026 live market coverage highlights key stocks capturing investor attention at the start of the week. Among them are Strategy, Coinbase, and Paramount Global. Inves...

item.title: Trump describes Iran ceasefire proposal as an important development
item.description: President Donald Trump don yan say United States don dey look into one proposal wey fit bring 45-day ceasefire for the war wey dey between Iran, the US and Israel. Trump yan say although the proposal ...

item.title: Honest Jos Trader Return ₦1 Million She Mistakenly Carried From Market Purchase
item.description: For Jos inside Plateau State, one Christian woman wey dem call Madam Serah Luca don show better honesty after she return one million naira wey she mistakenly collect inside goods she buy from one Musl...

item.title: Yanga lead the NBC Premier League as relegation fight tightens among lower clubs
item.description: Young Africans SC, popularly known as Yanga, continue to shine in the NBC Premier League, maintaining their dominance with 41 points from 17 matches and an impressive unbeaten run. While the Dar es Sa...

item.title: Trump comments on proposed 45-day ceasefire with Iran amid ongoing conflict
item.description: On Monday, former U.S. President Donald Trump addressed a proposed 45-day ceasefire in the ongoing Iran conflict, describing it as a 'very significant step,' though he emphasised it was not sufficient...

item.title: West Bengal: CCTV Footage Reveals Incident Involving Judicial Officers and Motorcycle Chase in Malda
item.description: A rather disturbing incident has surfaced regarding the upcoming 2026 Bengal elections, centered around a 'Sir' hearing in Malda. CCTV footage, which has now come to light, reportedly shows a convoy o...

item.title: Expert proposals to reduce administrative workload for family doctors in P.E.I.

item.title: Zanzibar: Parents and Students Protest Uhuru Torch Allowance Discrepancy
item.description: Drama unfolded in Zanzibar recently when students who participated in the Uhuru Torch races raised concerns over alleged mistreatment regarding promised allowances. Approximately 1,000 students from p...

item.title: Indian Nationals Evacuated from Iran and LPG Shipments Progress Through Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Since the onset of the West Asia conflict, nearly 1,800 Indian nationals have safely left Iran through Armenia and Azerbaijan, facilitated by the Indian embassy in Tehran. The evacuees include student...

item.title: Yulo Secures Bronze at Cairo World Cup Gymnastics Event
item.description: Filipino gymnast Eldrew Yulo continues to shine on the international stage, clinching another bronze medal at the Cairo World Cup. This accomplishment demonstrates his consistent skill and dedication ...

item.description: The upcoming World Cup matches in Toronto are projected to significantly boost tourism across Ontario, attracting both domestic and international visitors. Local businesses, hotels, and entertainment ...

item.title: Coronation, Alberta opens community-funded veterinary clinic to address rural livestock vet shortage
item.description: Rural Alberta is facing a critical shortage of veterinarians, particularly for large livestock, and the Town of Coronation along with Paintearth County has launched an innovative solution. Through the...

item.title: Trump attends White House Easter Egg Roll amid ongoing conflict in Iran
item.description: On 6 April 2026, the White House hosted its annual Easter Egg Roll, welcoming families and children to the South Lawn in a display of patriotic pageantry ahead of America's 250th birthday. President D...

item.title: Supreme Court to Hear NCERT Academics Barred over Judicial Corruption Chapter
item.description: Three academics involved in drafting a now-withdrawn NCERT textbook chapter on judicial corruption have approached the Supreme Court seeking a hearing after being barred from participating in governme...

item.title: KwaZulu-Natal schools shine at Kearsney Easter Rugby Festival despite storm challenges
item.description: The 2026 Kearsney Easter Rugby Festival wrapped up in Botha’s Hill on Monday, marking a triumphant weekend for KwaZulu-Natal’s premier school sides. Durban High School (DHS), Westville, and hosts Kear...

item.title: Community and Celebrities Support Mother Moving into Incomplete House
item.description: Joy Asiwaju, a mother of three, went viral after moving into her unfinished three-bedroom house with her children. Despite lacking basic amenities like toilets and proper flooring, she shared a house ...

item.title: The Importance of Learning to Say No and Set Boundaries
item.description: Saying no is a crucial life skill that many people struggle to practice. Social norms, cultural expectations, and generational influences often make it difficult to decline requests without feeling gu...
